# DDCS M350 Display & Feedback Methods

## Quick Access

## Part 1: Core Display Methods (417 lines)
[ddcs-display-methods-1-core.md](ddcs-display-methods-1-core.md)

**Basic display methods:**
- ✅ Method 1: Status Bar Display (#1503) - Persistent on-screen
- ✅ Method 2: Dialog Messages (#1505) - Popup confirmations
- ✅ Method 3: M0 Program Stop - Simple operator pause
- ✅ Method 3A: G4P-1 Interactive Pause - Community discovery
- ✅ Method 4: Buzzer Feedback - Audio alerts
- ✅ Method 5: Output Port Signals - External indicators
- ✅ Method 6: Coordinate Display - Write to position display
- ✅ Method 7: Persistent Variables - For later review
- ✅ What's NOT Available - FANUC features missing
- ✅ Practical Patterns - Real-world examples

**Start here for**: Basic display and feedback needs
